title: Eve Marder on the Crucial Resilience of Neurons
summary: Eve Marder’s research into the plasticity and resilience of nervous systems finds universal principles guiding life’s responses to stress. The post Eve Marder on the Crucial Resilience of Neurons first appeared on Quanta Magazine
content:
Eve Marder’s research into the plasticity and resilience of nervous systems finds universal principles guiding life’s responses to stress.
